title: Additional Multiword Prepositions
description: Practice additional multiword prepositions used for priority, separation, addition, cause, exceptions, and substitution.

questions.completedSentence: We arrived ahead of the other group.
questions.japanese: 他のグループより先に到着した。

questions.sentence: The game was canceled ___ the rain.
questions.completedSentence: The game was canceled because of the rain.
questions.japanese: 雨のため、試合は中止された。

questions.sentence: ___ the cost, we can discuss it later.
questions.completedSentence: As for the cost, we can discuss it later.
questions.japanese: 費用については、後で話し合うことができる。

questions.completedSentence: In addition to English, she studies Korean.
questions.japanese: 英語に加えて、彼女は韓国語も勉強している。

questions.completedSentence: Everyone passed except for Ken.
questions.japanese: ケンを除いて全員合格した。

questions.completedSentence: The delay was due to thick fog.
questions.japanese: 遅れは濃霧によるものだった。

questions.completedSentence: Keep this file apart from the others.
questions.japanese: このファイルは他のファイルと分けておくこと。

questions.completedSentence: Aya spoke in place of the team leader.
questions.japanese: アヤがチームリーダーの代わりに話した。

questions.completedSentence: The course covers writing as well as speaking.
questions.japanese: その授業ではスピーキングに加えてライティングも扱う。

questions.completedSentence: He stayed home on account of illness.
questions.japanese: 彼は病気のため家にいた。

questions.completedSentence: Our train arrived ahead of schedule.
questions.japanese: 私たちの列車は予定より早く到着した。

questions.completedSentence: We left early because of the snow.
questions.japanese: 雪のため早く出発した。

questions.completedSentence: Use yogurt in place of cream.
questions.japanese: クリームの代わりにヨーグルトを使うこと。

questions.completedSentence: As for tomorrow, no class is planned.
questions.japanese: 明日については、授業の予定はない。

questions.sentence: The room was empty ___ one chair.
questions.completedSentence: The room was empty except for one chair.
questions.japanese: その部屋には椅子が一脚ある以外、何もなかった。

questions.sentence: The match was postponed ___ strong winds.
questions.completedSentence: The match was postponed due to strong winds.
questions.japanese: 試合は強風のため延期された。

questions.completedSentence: The cabin stands apart from the village.
questions.japanese: その小屋は村から離れた場所に建っている。

questions.completedSentence: She can read French as well as English.
questions.japanese: 彼女は英語だけでなくフランス語も読める。

questions.completedSentence: The road closed on account of an accident.
questions.japanese: 事故のため道路が閉鎖された。

questions.completedSentence: In addition to the textbook, bring a notebook.
questions.japanese: 教科書に加えて、ノートも持参すること。

questions.completedSentence: Ken finished ahead of everyone else.
questions.japanese: ケンは他の全員より先に終えた。

questions.sentence: ___ the weather, it was a good trip.
questions.completedSentence: As for the weather, it was a good trip.
questions.japanese: 天気については、良い旅行だった。

questions.sentence: We used a chair ___ a ladder.
questions.completedSentence: We used a chair in place of a ladder.
questions.japanese: はしごの代わりに椅子を使った。

questions.sentence: The picnic ended early ___ the heat.
questions.completedSentence: The picnic ended early because of the heat.
questions.japanese: 暑さのため、ピクニックは早く終わった。

questions.sentence: All the lights were off ___ one.
questions.completedSentence: All the lights were off except for one.
questions.japanese: 一つを除いて、すべての明かりが消えていた。

questions.sentence: The cancellation was ___ a power failure.
questions.completedSentence: The cancellation was due to a power failure.
questions.japanese: 中止は停電によるものだった。

questions.sentence: The twins rarely go anywhere ___ each other.
questions.completedSentence: The twins rarely go anywhere apart from each other.
questions.japanese: その双子はほとんど別々に出かけない。

questions.completedSentence: The job requires patience as well as skill.
questions.japanese: その仕事には技術だけでなく忍耐力も必要である。

questions.completedSentence: She missed class on account of a fever.
questions.japanese: 彼女は発熱のため授業を欠席した。

questions.sentence: ___ the fee, students must buy a book.
questions.completedSentence: In addition to the fee, students must buy a book.
questions.japanese: 料金に加えて、学生は本も購入しなければならない。

questions.completedSentence: Our team moved ahead of theirs.
questions.japanese: 私たちのチームは相手チームより前に出た。

questions.completedSentence: The road is closed due to flooding.
questions.japanese: その道路は洪水のため閉鎖されている。

questions.sentence: The app works on tablets ___ phones.
questions.completedSentence: The app works on tablets as well as phones.
questions.japanese: そのアプリは携帯電話だけでなくタブレットでも使える。

questions.completedSentence: Keep chemicals apart from food.
questions.japanese: 薬品は食品と分けて保管すること。

questions.completedSentence: We stayed inside because of the storm.
questions.japanese: 嵐のため、私たちは屋内にいた。

questions.sentence: ___ the final exam, it will be online.
questions.completedSentence: As for the final exam, it will be online.
questions.japanese: 期末試験については、オンラインで実施される。

questions.completedSentence: Everyone agreed except for Mika.
questions.japanese: ミカを除いて全員が賛成した。

questions.sentence: I used a towel ___ a pillow.
questions.completedSentence: I used a towel in place of a pillow.
questions.japanese: 枕の代わりにタオルを使った。

questions.completedSentence: He retired early on account of poor health.
questions.japanese: 彼は健康上の理由で早期退職した。

questions.completedSentence: In addition to grammar, the course teaches pronunciation.
questions.japanese: 文法に加えて、その授業では発音も扱う。

questions.sentence: She is two places ___ me in line.
questions.completedSentence: She is two places ahead of me in line.
questions.japanese: 彼女は列で私の二人前にいる。

questions.completedSentence: The problem was due to human error.
questions.japanese: その問題は人為的ミスによるものだった。

questions.completedSentence: The hotel offers breakfast as well as dinner.
questions.japanese: そのホテルでは夕食だけでなく朝食も提供している。

questions.sentence: The child had never slept ___ his parents.
questions.completedSentence: The child had never slept apart from his parents.
questions.japanese: その子どもは両親と離れて寝たことがなかった。

questions.sentence: The flight was late ___ bad weather.
questions.completedSentence: The flight was late because of bad weather.
questions.japanese: 悪天候のため、飛行機が遅れた。

questions.completedSentence: Everyone was ready except for Taro.
questions.japanese: タロウを除いて全員準備ができていた。

questions.sentence: Use the side door ___ the main entrance.
questions.completedSentence: Use the side door in place of the main entrance.
questions.japanese: 正面入口の代わりに横のドアを使うこと。

questions.sentence: ___ your proposal, I need more time.
questions.completedSentence: As for your proposal, I need more time.
questions.japanese: あなたの提案については、もう少し時間が必要である。

questions.sentence: The event was moved indoors ___ the wind.
questions.completedSentence: The event was moved indoors on account of the wind.
questions.japanese: 風のため、行事は屋内に変更された。

questions.sentence: ___ the regular class, we have a workshop.
questions.completedSentence: In addition to the regular class, we have a workshop.
questions.japanese: 通常授業に加えて、ワークショップもある。

questions.completedSentence: She arrived ahead of the deadline.
questions.japanese: 彼女は締め切りより前に到着した。

questions.sentence: The meeting ended early ___ a power cut.
questions.completedSentence: The meeting ended early because of a power cut.
questions.japanese: 停電のため、会議は早く終了した。

questions.completedSentence: The museum is closed due to repairs.
questions.japanese: その博物館は修理のため休館している。

questions.sentence: The guesthouse stands ___ the main hotel.
questions.completedSentence: The guesthouse stands apart from the main hotel.
questions.japanese: ゲストハウスは本館から離れて建っている。

questions.sentence: The package includes batteries ___ a charger.
questions.completedSentence: The package includes batteries as well as a charger.
questions.japanese: その商品には充電器だけでなく電池も含まれている。

questions.completedSentence: No one complained except for one student.
questions.japanese: 一人の学生を除いて誰も不満を言わなかった。

questions.completedSentence: We used paper cups in place of glasses.
questions.japanese: グラスの代わりに紙コップを使った。

questions.sentence: ___ the next unit, it looks harder.
questions.completedSentence: As for the next unit, it looks harder.
questions.japanese: 次の単元については、より難しそうである。

questions.completedSentence: He was absent on account of family reasons.
questions.japanese: 彼は家庭の事情で欠席した。

questions.sentence: ___ the report, submit the data file.
questions.completedSentence: In addition to the report, submit the data file.
questions.japanese: レポートに加えて、データファイルも提出すること。
